subject: details on atr briefing at the alec conference

emails.subject: details on ATR briefing at the ALEC conference
emails.subject_base: details on ATR briefing at the ALEC conference
emails.body: details on ATR briefing at the ALEC conference The Enron-sponsored briefing on energy policy will be from 5-6:30 pm in the Booth Room on the 5th floor of the Marriott Marquis on Friday, August 3. Our presentation will be done by Jeff Dasovich. Grover Norquist and Americans for Tax Reform will be carrying out all logistics. There should be time for the presentation, questions, and discussion. Best, Pat

emails.subject: Re: details on ATR briefing at the ALEC conference
emails.subject_base: details on ATR briefing at the ALEC conference
emails.body: Re: details on ATR briefing at the ALEC conference Thanks Pat. Do you know who will be in the audience? And how many folks we are expecting? Also, if there are specific things that you folks want/don't want me to say, please let me know. Best, Jeff Pat Shortridge 07/30/2001 10:42 AM

emails.subject: Re: details on ATR briefing at the ALEC conference
emails.subject_base: details on ATR briefing at the ALEC conference
emails.body: Re: details on ATR briefing at the ALEC conference Thursday evening. Staying at the W. When and where would you like to hook up? Enron have NYC office? Best Jeff

emails.subject: Re: details on ATR briefing at the ALEC conference
emails.subject_base: details on ATR briefing at the ALEC conference
emails.body: Re: details on ATR briefing at the ALEC conference It will be folks from Americans for Tax Reform and many of the think tank people you'll see on Friday. Rob Bradley will be there as well. It might be fun, but it's not a big deal if you can't make it.
